calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-06-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Stephen D. Hibbard, Esq. for Petitioner: Nancy King, present as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Arianna Delphine King, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Delphine Margolis King.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-04-2005 Reset To Jan-06-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Stephen D. Hibbard, Esq. for Petitioner: Nancy King as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Arianna Delphine King.
Lacks the appearance of the Petitioner and at counsel's request, matter is continued to Jan. 6, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
